key_finding: Teacher model (gemma-4-E4B-it) generated degenerate CoT traces (single-line answers, repeated tokens). Student learned to mimic the template but not actual reasoning. CoT trace quality is critical for distillation.
distillation_method: Behavioral cloning on teacher CoT traces (full fine-tuning, no LoRA - PEFT incompatible with Gemma4ClippableLinear)
